name: Kindergarten Financial Literacy & Entrepreneurship — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for earning through helpful work, pretend shops, and planning a goal. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with earning through helpful work, pretend shops, and planning a goal.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about earning through helpful work, pretend shops, and planning a goal through a close look at earning through helpful work, pretend shops, and planning a goal.

activities.title: A close look at earning through helpful work, pretend shops, and planning a goal
